commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human review is needed for contributor real behavior proof, config-surface acceptance, and sequencing with related Telegram progress PRs; there is no narrow code defect for automation to repair right now.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain defect was found in the current 9-file Telegram/config/docs diff; the stale dependency-change comment is not reflected in the current PR commit stat. (sha=96656743cee24e1fb5621186520e182458e6a817)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds two Telegram preview config keys, a new interleaved progress renderer, dispatcher wiring, config metadata/docs, and focused helper/schema tests for rendering reasoning plus structured progress events into one durable Telegram reasoning-lane message.

PR surface: Source +321, Tests +234, Docs +2, Generated -5. Total +552 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this is a feature PR. The current gap is missing live Telegram proof for the new enabled behavior rather than an unverified current-main defect.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed for contributor real behavior proof, config-surface acceptance, and sequencing with related Telegram progress PRs; there is no narrow code defect for automation to repair right now.

target.title: feat(telegram): opt-in interleaved progress lane
target.body:
## Summary

Add an opt-in Telegram renderer that projects reasoning text and structured runtime events into a single durable live message on the reasoning lane, matching CLI ergonomics without changing execution semantics.

**Gated on three conditions:** `toolProgressEnabled && interleavedProgress === true && hasReasoningLane` — inherits every existing group/DM/visibility gate.

## What it does

When `channels.telegram.streaming.preview.interleavedProgress` is enabled:
- Reasoning text streams into the interleaved message with a "Thinking" header
- Tool starts append a sanitized line (tool name only, never raw args by default)
- Item/plan/approval/command/patch events append title-only summary lines
- Rolling timer suffix shows elapsed time while running, cleared on completion
- Falls back to existing `pushStreamToolProgress` lane when the flag is off

## Key design choices

- **Projection-only** — no changes to prompts, model routing, tool execution, or auth
- **No raw data** — tool lines show name only; `interleavedToolArgs` is a separate opt-in for sanitized args
- **No new event contract** — consumes existing `onReasoningStream`, `onToolStart`, `onItemEvent`, `onPlanUpdate`, `onApprovalEvent`, `onCommandOutput`, `onPatchSummary` callbacks unchanged

## Changed files

- `extensions/telegram/src/interleaved-progress.ts` — pure render helpers (gate, sanitize, header-strip, message render, reasoning checkpoint, status-line append)
- `extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.ts` — wire callbacks through renderer with fallback; clear rolling timer in `finally`
- `src/config/types.telegram.ts` + `src/config/zod-schema.providers-core.ts` — opt-in flag schema
- Config surface docs + bundled channel metadata regeneration

## Test plan

- [x] 18 unit tests covering: disabled-by-default, explicit opt-out, tool-progress-off, no-reasoning-lane, header dedup, rolling-timer lifecycle, whitespace-collapse + length cap, reasoning checkpoint cumulative delivery
- [ ] Live Telegram verification with `interleavedProgress: true`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: anagnorisis2peripeteia
